# Design Document

> **Required before any feature PR.** Fill in all sections. Submit to Architect for approval.

---

## Feature Name

<!-- Short, descriptive name (e.g., "Skill Search by Category") -->

## Problem

<!-- What user problem does this solve? 2-3 sentences. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How will it work? Include API changes, new modules, data model changes. -->

### API Changes

<!-- New endpoints, modified endpoints, request/response shapes -->

### Data Model Changes

<!-- New tables, new columns, migration strategy -->

### CLI Changes

<!-- New `lazy` subcommands, changed flags, output format -->

## Affected Files

<!-- List every file that will be created or modified -->

| File | Action (create/modify/delete) | Purpose |
|------|------|---------|

## Dependencies

<!-- New Python packages, Meilisearch config changes, new env vars -->

## Risks

<!-- What could go wrong? Backward compat? Performance? Security? -->

## Test Strategy Summary

<!-- Link to test_spec.md. Key test scenarios in one sentence each. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches were considered? Why was this one chosen? -->

---

## Architect Decision

<!-- Filled by Architect after review -->

- [ ] **Approved** — proceed to test_spec.md and plan.md
- [ ] **Revise** — see comments below
- [ ] **Rejected** — reason below
